assignments.twist: score-based generative diffusion SDE with a learned drift (neural score) and its deterministic ODE counterpart
the associated density-evolution PDE whose residual bounds the ODE-vs-SDE Wasserstein gap

core_model_summary: A score-based diffusion generative model as a drift-diffusion SDE paired with its Fokker-Planck density evolution, used to bound and close the gap between ODE- and SDE-induced sampling distributions.
